results.name: keyword anthem
results.description: Give your entire team a keyword.

results.name: keyword counter
results.description: A collection of all the keyword counters referenced by cards.

results.name: keyword errata
results.description: These cards originally spelled out an ability that became a keyword, and were thus given errata.

results.name: keyword errata flash
results.description: Cards featuring Flash, before it was keyworded in Time Spiral

results.name: keyword errata scry
results.description: Cards that Scry but were either printed before the keyword was made, or before it was made deciduous in Magic Origins

results.name: keyword errata surveil
results.description: Cards that Surveil but were either printed before the keyword was made, or before it was made deciduous in The Brothers' War

results.name: keyword soup
results.description: These cards list out all or almost all the keyword abilities found in their set, possibly restricted by color.

results.name: khan of tarkir
results.description: The Khans of the five clans of Tarkir, in either the Khans of Tarkir timeline or Fate Reforged.

results.name: khenra
results.description: Jackal-like humanoids found on Amonkhet.

results.name: khopesh
results.description: An Egyptian sickle-sword. It combines the functions of a sword, sickle, axe, and hook.

results.name: khrusor
results.description: Heliod's spear.

results.name: kilt
results.description: A traditional Scottish and Irish skirt worn around the waist extending to the knees.

results.name: kimono
results.description: A style of traditional Japanese gown.

results.name: kintsugi
results.description: Pottery repaired with gold

results.name: kiora
results.description: A merfolk planeswalker who is native of Zendikar. Stole Thasda's bident during the events of Theros block. Nice.

results.name: kiran nalaar
results.description: Chandra's father, and husband of Pia Nalaar. By the events of Kaladesh, Kiran was deceased. He became memorialised in Aether Revolt by the rebel airship Heart of Kiran.

results.name: kirby krackle
results.description: A specific kind of black dots that have been associated with Comic Artists like Jack Kirby, meant to depict energy, expolosions, phenomena, and negative space of such things.

results.name: kismet effect
results.description: Cards that make certain types of permanents enter the battlefield tapped.

results.name: kitsune
results.description: Fox-like humanoids found on Kamigawa.

results.name: kjeldor
results.description: A former nation of Dominaria active in eastern Terisiare during the Ice Age.

results.name: knit cap
results.description: Also known as a Beanie or a Toque. Sometimes with a bobble on the top.
